title: FX 20000 mAh Powerbank with Type-C 3A Fast Charging Output, Portable External Battery Pack in Black for Smartphones, Tablets and USB Devices, High Capacity Travel Power Bank

features: HIGH CAPACITY POWER: 20000 mAh battery provides multiple full charges for smartphones, tablets and USB devices, keeping your devices powered during travel, work or daily activities.
FAST TYPE-C CHARGING: Type-C 3A output delivers rapid and efficient charging for compatible devices, reducing waiting time and ensuring your electronics stay ready when needed.
DUAL DEVICE SUPPORT: Dual USB ports allow two devices to be charged at the same time, offering convenience for busy schedules, shared use or multi-device households.
PORTABLE AND CONVENIENT: Compact, lightweight design fits easily into bags, backpacks or pockets, making it ideal for commuting, travel or outdoor adventures without bulk.
BUILT-IN SAFETY FEATURES: Integrated overcharge, overcurrent and short-circuit protection safeguards your devices while charging, giving peace of mind during everyday use.
description: FX 20000 mAh Powerbank with Type-C 3A Output, Black FX 20000 mAh Powerbank provides reliable, high-capacity charging for smartphones, tablets and other USB devices. Compact and portable, it is ideal for travel, commuting and daily use. Equipped with Type-C 3A fast charging output and dual USB ports, it allows multiple devices to be charged simultaneously. Built-in safety features protect your devices from overcharge, overcurrent and short circuits, ensuring safe and efficient power delivery wherever you go. Features: High 20000 mAh capacity delivers multiple full charges for smartphones, tablets and USB devices Type-C 3A fast charging output ensures efficient and rapid power delivery Dual USB ports allow simultaneous charging of two devices for added convenience Compact and portable design fits easily in bags or pockets for travel and daily use Built-in safety features protect against overcharging, overcurrent and short circuits Specifications: Capacity: 20000 mAh Output: Type-C 3A and dual USB ports Input: Micro USB / Type-C charging Colour: Black Protection: Overcharge, overcurrent and short-circuit protection Box Contains: 1 x FX 20000 mAh Powerbank (Black)
